evals.prompt: Plan the Tokyo trip — balanced pace, food + culture interests, kid-friendly anchors.
evals.expected_output: POI discovery via research; curated shortlist; day-by-day itinerary appended to the trip page; new POI pages created in wiki/travel/places/tokyo/.

evals.prompt: What should we do in Kyoto for 4 days in cherry-blossom season?
evals.expected_output: Discovery + curated POIs + itinerary tuned to season + duration.

evals.prompt: Could we go to Iceland for spring break? Discover-only mode.
evals.expected_output: Discover-only research; produces a research project with candidate-list artifact; does NOT populate a trip page.
